title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with minimal configuration. It automates both control plane and data plane management while allowing customization for advanced users, and includes built-in support for AI workloads with Karpenter-based auto scaling.
